sentiment.reasoning: Mixed results in a pilot program indicate uncertainty regarding the scalability and commercial viability of the automation process.

headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors sees 10% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% drop in new customer orders is a direct negative indicator of demand, likely to impact financial performance in the near and medium term.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
